name: opencode-huge-agents
description: OpenCode agent pack: ask (code questions), solver (strategy-first planning), and orchestrate (plan first, apply after approval)

scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('opencode-huge-agents installed with 3 agents: ask, solver, orchestrate
To continue setup, run: npx opencode-huge-agents install
To refresh later, run: npx opencode-huge-agents autoupdate
With Bun: bunx opencode-huge-agents install')"

author: yurirxmos
